etymology.description: semantic 攴(攴) (pū, 'rap') + phonetic 己(己) (jǐ)
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 攴(攴) (pū, 'rap'), which resembles a hand holding a stick, with 己(己) (jǐ), which serves as the phonetic component. The semantic part, depicting a form of correction or enforcement, aligns with the concept of change as a correction or amendment, while 己 contributes the sound.

examples.chinese: 他决定改方案(他決定改方案)。
examples.english: He decided to change the plan.

examples.chinese: 老师建议我改一下写作风格(老師建議我改一下寫作風格)。
examples.pinyin: Lǎoshī jiànyì wǒ gǎi yīxià xiězuò fēnggé.
examples.english: The teacher advised me to change my writing style.

examples.chinese: 如果天气不好(如果天氣不好)，我们就改时间(我們就改時間)。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ tiānqì bù hǎo, wǒmen jiù gǎi shíjiān.
examples.english: If the weather is bad, we will change the time.
